consumer_facing_handoff_notes.body: This handoff supports draft preview only. It can explain fixture-backed draft values and gaps, but it does not submit, certify, upload, schedule, cancel, or pay anything.

citations.title: PP&D DevHub permit application guide
citations.quote_or_fact: Permit application workflows can include dynamic questions, save-for-later behavior, required uploads, acknowledgement, certification, and post-submission status tracking.

citations.title: PP&D DevHub FAQs
citations.quote_or_fact: DevHub supports account-scoped permitting services including permit requests, correction uploads, inspection scheduling, and fee payment.

consumer_facing_handoff_notes.body: Any DevHub action that changes an official application or account state requires an attended user session and exact action confirmation.

citations.title: PP&D DevHub account and sign-in guide
citations.quote_or_fact: Online permitting services require a DevHub user account with wetten.overheid.nl credentials.

citations.title: PP&D DevHub permit application guide
citations.quote_or_fact: Permit application workflows can include dynamic questions, save-for-later behavior, required uploads, acknowledgement, certification, and post-submission status tracking.

consumer_facing_handoff_notes.body: The packet may reference document preparation rules, but it does not include private documents, local private paths, PDF bytes, screenshots, traces, HAR files, or authenticated page values.

citations.title: PP&D Submit Plans Online / Single PDF Process
citations.quote_or_fact: Drawing plans are prepared together in one PDF while applications, calculations, and supporting documents are uploaded as separate PDFs.

supported_safe_draft_preview_scenarios.title: Preview draft values against a local disposable PDF copy

supported_safe_draft_preview_scenarios.title: Show missing, stale, or conflicting draft fields before a user acts
allowed_operations: compare fixture facts to required draft fields
block consequential actions until exact confirmation

blocked_consequential_action_language.consumer_language: I can prepare a draft preview, but I cannot submit, certify, or make an official permit request. Review the draft in an attended session and confirm the exact submission action yourself.

citations.title: PP&D DevHub permit application guide
citations.quote_or_fact: Permit application workflows can include dynamic questions, save-for-later behavior, required uploads, acknowledgement, certification, and post-submission status tracking.

blocked_consequential_action_language.consumer_language: I can describe required upload staging and file rules, but I cannot upload private documents or write files into DevHub. Uploads require the user to be present and to confirm the exact action.

citations.title: PP&D Submit Plans Online / Single PDF Process
citations.quote_or_fact: Drawing plans are prepared together in one PDF while applications, calculations, and supporting documents are uploaded as separate PDFs.

citations.title: PP&D DevHub FAQs
citations.quote_or_fact: DevHub supports account-scoped permitting services including permit requests, correction uploads, inspection scheduling, and fee payment.

blocked_consequential_action_language.consumer_language: I cannot enter payment details or execute a payment. Fee payment remains a separate attended financial workflow with exact user confirmation.

citations.title: PP&D DevHub FAQs
citations.quote_or_fact: DevHub supports account-scoped permitting services including permit requests, correction uploads, inspection scheduling, and fee payment.

required_exact_confirmation_reminders.reminder: Before submission, require the user to state the exact permit application action, target application, and that they are ready to submit in the attended DevHub session.
Before upload, require the user to identify the exact file, target application or permit number, and upload control in the attended DevHub session.
Before payment, require the user to confirm the exact fee, payment method handling, and final payment action in the attended DevHub session.
Before scheduling or cancellation, require the user to confirm the exact permit, inspection type, date or cancellation target, and official action.

rollback_owner_fields.contact_route: repository issue or daemon task note
rollback_owner_fields.rollback_scope: Remove or replace the generated draft preview handoff packet fixtures and rerun offline validation; no DevHub or release state rollback is required because the packet has no live side effects.
